consistency.notes: The spell level (0) is consistent with the low-power, utility nature described in the effects.

quality.notes: The entry is complete, providing all standard D&D 5e spell fields (slug, name, level, school, ritual, casting time, range, components, duration, description, classes). The description clearly itemizes the available effects.

mechanics.interaction_notes: As a Cantrip (Level 0), its effects are minor, instantaneous, or short-lived, fitting its intended use as practice or minor utility. The limitation of 'up to three non-instantaneous effects active at a time' provides a necessary mechanical restraint for a low-level, highly versatile spell.
mechanics.balance_assessment: Well-balanced for a cantrip. It offers significant utility for non-combat scenarios (cleaning, lighting, minor flavoring) without offering direct combat advantage.

suggestions: No significant mechanical changes are suggested; the spell is a standard, well-established cantrip.

If this were for a custom setting, verify that the listed classes (bard, sorcerer, warlock, wizard) are the intended recipients, as this spell often appears on other utility-focused lists (like Artificer in official material, though not listed here).
